# Form D Deadline Calculator

> Free local-first, no-tracking Form D deadline calculator for Regulation D first-sale timing.

Site: https://form-d-deadline-calculator.vercel.app/
Source: https://github.com/Turner-Levey/form-d-deadline-calculator
Preview image: https://form-d-deadline-calculator.vercel.app/preview.png
IndexNow key file: https://form-d-deadline-calculator.vercel.app/4f2e8d9c6b7a4f3a9e1c0d8b6a2f4c1e.txt

## Tool

- [Form D Deadline Calculator](https://form-d-deadline-calculator.vercel.app/): Estimate a Form D notice target date from a Regulation D first-sale date, copy a source-linked memo, or export a CSV planning row.

## Notes

- Runs entirely in the browser.
- No signup, cookies, analytics, beacons, uploads, external scripts, or browser storage.
- Handles weekends, standard U.S. federal holidays, and optional extra SEC closure dates.
- Informational worksheet only; not legal advice, securities advice, investment advice, EDGAR validation, SEC affiliation, state notice coverage, or an EDGAR filing service.
